app_summary: RedReader is an Android application that allows users to access content from Reddit using the Reddit API. It provides a user-friendly interface for browsing subreddits, viewing posts, and managing user accounts. The app also offers customization options such as themes and font sizes.

core_workflows.description:
1. User starts on the Agreement Screen (State 0).
2. Accepts the terms and conditions.
3. Navigates to the Main Menu (State 1).
4. Selects 'Front Page'.
5. Views posts on the Front Page (State 2).
6. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
7. Selects 'All Subreddits'.
8. Views all available subreddits (State 3).
9. Selects a subreddit.
10. Views posts in the selected subreddit (State 4).
11. Navigates back through the subreddit selection screen (State 5).
12. Returns to the Main Menu.
13. Selects 'Find Location'.
14. Searches for a location (State 6).
15. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
16. Selects 'Subscribed Subreddits'.
17. Views subscribed subreddits (State 7).
18. Selects a subscribed subreddit.
19. Views posts in the selected subscribed subreddit (State 8).
20. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
21. Selects 'Reddit Accounts'.
22. Views or manages Reddit accounts (State 9).
23. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
24. Selects 'Add Reddit Account'.
25. Adds a new Reddit account (State 10).
26. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
27. Selects 'Settings'.
28. Accesses various settings menus (State 11).
29. Navigates back to the Main Menu.
30. Logs out or switches to an anonymous account.
31. Returns to the Agreement Screen.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow allows users to browse Reddit content, search for locations, manage Reddit accounts, and access various app settings.

core_workflows.description:
